title: National%20Biometric%20Identification%20System%20Liberia%20Case%20Study
content:
CASE STUD Y
NBIS ( NATIONAL BIOMETRIC 
IDENTIFICATION SYSTEM)Design, Installation, Commissioning, 
Maintenance and Supply of ICT 
Infrastructure for A National Biometric 
Registration & Identiﬁcation System for 
The Republic of Liberia


NIR is an autonomous body formed and the Board of Registrars was 
established In May, 2012. Having signed into law the National Registry Act 
on August 1, 2011, Hon. J. Tiah Nagbe, former MIA Deputy Minister for 
Research and Development Planning was appointed as Executive Director, 
and head of the management team of the NIR. 
Liberia faced signi/f_icant challenges due to the absence of a National 
Identi/f_ication Program, making it diﬃcult to distinguish citizens from 
foreign nationals. This lack of a centralized system hindered 
background checks, crime tracking, and employment veri/f_ication. 
Without proper identity management, individuals could obtain 
multiple IDs, complicating eﬀorts to maintain accurate records and 
enabling crimes such as election rigging. Law enforcement agencies 
struggled to track oﬀenders, and the banking sector lacked a reliable 
Credit Bureau System due to insuﬃcient identi/f_ication proof. Nation-
al ID cards are crucial for establishing citizenship, ensuring access to 
rights and freedoms, and supporting economic and social systems. 
Implementing a secure identi/f_ication system became essential to 
address these issues and improve governance and security.Cust omer:
Public SectorIndustry:
Business Situa tion:
Solution: 
 
 Quick Shee tBusiness Situa tion
Solution
NIR (National Identi/f_ication Registry)
Liberia lacked a National ID system, causing 
challenges in crime tracking, employment 
veri/f_ication, identity duplication, election rigging, 
and banking support.
Techno Brain's Biometric National Identi/f_ication 
System ensures secure registration, 
authentication, de-duplication, and issuance of 
tamper-resistant ID cards, enabling e-government 
services.
The system enables user enrolment, biometric 
data capture, duplication checks, data approval, 
adjudication, batch printing, quality assurance, 
card dispatch, and detailed reporting for eﬃcient 
identity management.
Techno Brain proposed a Biometric National Identi/f_ication System to 
enable secure registration and authentication of Liberian citizens 
while maintaining centralized records without manual checks.
Key Features:
The system includes modules for Enrolment, Veri/f_ication, 
Identi/f_ication, De-duplication, Card Issuance, and Record 
Management. It supports /f_ield operations using portable modules and 
hardware, ensuring remote service delivery. Each individual receives 
a 10-digit National ID Number (NIN) after biometric de-duplication, 
valid for a lifetime.
System Capabilities (NBIS):
NBIS supports National Registration for identity veri/f_ication, 
citizenship, inheritance, and eligibility for social programs. It also 
issues National Identity Cards to citizens and residents.
Core Functions of NIR:
• Issuance of National Identity Cards to eligible citizens and 
residents.
• Administration of registration, de-duplication, and identi/f_ica-
tion services.
• Secure integration of subsystems using standards-based 
services and governance.Business Objectives of NBIS:
• Accurate and secure identi/f_ication for citizens and residents.
• Tamper-resistant, ECOWAS-compliant e-ID cards.
• Economic and social development support.
• Interoperable national identity databases for e-government 
services.
• Real-time authentication for ID and NIN veri/f_ication.

 
 
Major Features of the Solution 
ProvidedTechnologies
• Enrolment of users (Citizens and Residents)
• Contact and contactless capturing of the data, photo, signature, 
/f_ingerprints and documents
• Biometric capturing (Photo, /f_ingerprints) to eliminate any 
duplication
• Review and approval of enrolment data
• Adjudication – in case of matching biometrics in the system
• Batch Printing 
• QA of printed cards
• Cards dispatch
• Reporting – Various reporting like Revenue, district wise, 
enrolments, etc.• Web based Online Integrated Driving License and Vehicle 
Registration System 
• Secure Register, Microsoft SQL Server, Microsoft .NET, C#, 
Javascript, ASP, Third party API for biometrics, Web Services for 
real time integration with Revenue Authority and Banking 
system for payment collection and con/f_irmation
Key Bene/f_its Experienced by 
Customer and stakeholders.
The key bene/f_its are 
1. Procuring a national ID card for their identity and to be used in all 
relevant places where authorization is required.
2. Easy veri/f_ication of identity in banks, Telcos, etc
3. Citizenship identify of an individual
